summary: Comprehensive testing of FadeChat supercharged private chatting platform completed successfully. All backend APIs and frontend features are working correctly including 3D graphics, security features, and modern UI.
passed_tests: Server health check and uptime monitoring
Room creation with custom themes and settings
Room settings updates and theme switching
Leave/join room functionality with error handling
Security status indicators (E2E, IP Masked, Screenshot Protected, Auto-destruct)
Room theme selector with 3 themes (Cyber Frost, Neon Pulse, Matrix)
Chat interface with room code display and copy functionality
Voice message recorder UI and controls
File upload UI with encryption indicators
Screenshot protection overlay on window focus loss
